predicates.name: provides_proof_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_eu_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under Union law on free movement as relevant to the legal definition of a third-country national.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: satisfies_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person satisfies the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_illegally_staying
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as being in illegal stay.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure determining or transferring responsibility for an international protection request.

predicates.name: subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: absconding_risk_current_and_real
predicates.description: The assessed risk that the person may abscond is current and real.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person's situation has been performed.

predicates.name: individual_circumstances_considered
predicates.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay.

predicates.name: late_international_protection_request
predicates.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for immigration rules.

predicates.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_compliance_measure
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, a specified transfer, refusal, removal, entry-ban, less coercive, restrictive, or equivalent measure.

predicates.name: active_entry_ban_applies
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: new_application_after_negative_decision_or_measure
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a negative decision or relevant measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_bound_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in a state bound by responsibility-determination rules after an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications that led to negative decisions or no residence title.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_bound_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in a state bound by responsibility-determination rules.

predicates.name: came_for_different_purpose_than_application
predicates.description: The person declared, or the file shows, that they came for purposes other than those of the submitted request or application.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_immigration_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for having filed a manifestly unlawful immigration appeal.

predicates.name: has_objective_absconding_risk_criterion
predicates.description: At least one objective statutory criterion for risk of absconding is met.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: The person is legally considered to present a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_as_national_with_travel_document_willingness
predicates.description: The national authority of the person's country recognized the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a travel document.

predicates.name: minister_may_issue_travel_document_for_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person belongs to a nationality category for which the competent minister may issue a travel document.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.
